steps.expected: Sync demo-skill to both configured hosts with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exit 0; stdout reported synced on shuvtest and shuvbot.

steps.action: Direct SSH verification on shuvtest and shuvbot
steps.expected: /tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/repo/demo-skill exists on each host with SKILL.md and run.sh matching local checksums.
steps.observed: Both hosts exposed the synced files at the assigned repo path and their SHA-256 checksums matched the local skill files.

sshVerification.command:
ssh shuvtest 'sh -lc '"'"'skill_dir=/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/repo/demo-skill
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'host=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(hostname)"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'skill_dir=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$skill_dir"
ls -la "$skill_dir"
printf -- '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'--- SKILL.md ---
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
cat "$skill_dir/SKILL.md"
printf -- '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
--- run.sh ---
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
cat "$skill_dir/run.sh"
printf -- '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
--- checksums ---
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  sha256sum "$skill_dir/SKILL.md" "$skill_dir/run.sh"
else
  shasum -a 256 "$skill_dir/SKILL.md" "$skill_dir/run.sh"
fi
'"'"''

ssh shuvbot 'sh -lc '"'"'skill_dir=/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/repo/demo-skill
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'host=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(hostname)"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'skill_dir=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$skill_dir"
ls -la "$skill_dir"
printf -- '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'--- SKILL.md ---
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
cat "$skill_dir/SKILL.md"
printf -- '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
--- run.sh ---
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
cat "$skill_dir/run.sh"
printf -- '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
--- checksums ---
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  sha256sum "$skill_dir/SKILL.md" "$skill_dir/run.sh"
else
  shasum -a 256 "$skill_dir/SKILL.md" "$skill_dir/run.sh"
fi
'"'"''

steps.expected: Fail locally with a clear missing-skill error before any SSH work.
steps.observed: exit 1; stdout was 'Error: Skill "missing-skill" not found at /tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli/skillops/local-skills/missing-skill'.

steps.action: Inspect CLI output and re-verify remote repo contents over SSH
steps.expected: No host-level output or SSH warning from the CLI command, and remote repo state remains unchanged.
steps.observed: The CLI output contained only the missing-skill error (no host rows or SSH warning), and direct SSH verification showed unchanged repo checksums on both hosts.

steps.expected: Create the active skill symlink on both hosts with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exit 0; stdout reported activated for shuvtest and shuvbot.

steps.expected: /tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/active/demo-skill is a symlink to /tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/repo/demo-skill on both hosts.

sshVerification.command:
ssh shuvtest 'sh -lc '"'"'link=/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/active/demo-skill
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'host=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(hostname)"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'link=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$link"
ls -la "$(dirname "$link")"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'target=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(readlink "$link")"
test -L "$link"
'"'"''

ssh shuvbot 'sh -lc '"'"'link=/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/active/demo-skill
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'host=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(hostname)"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'link=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$link"
ls -la "$(dirname "$link")"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'target=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(readlink "$link")"
test -L "$link"
'"'"''

steps.expected: Return exit code 0 and report already-active behavior on both hosts.
steps.observed: exit 0; stdout reported already active for shuvtest and shuvbot.

steps.action: Direct SSH symlink verification after rerun
steps.expected: The active symlink remains present and still points at the remote repo skill path.
steps.observed: Both hosts still had `/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/active/demo-skill` pointing to `/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/repo/demo-skill`.

steps.expected: Remove the active symlink on both hosts with exit code 0.
steps.observed: exit 0; stdout reported deactivated for shuvtest and shuvbot.

steps.action: Direct SSH verification of link removal and repo preservation
steps.expected: /tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/active/demo-skill is absent while /tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/repo/demo-skill still exists on both hosts.
steps.observed: Both hosts reported link_exists=no and repo_exists=yes.

sshVerification.command:
ssh shuvtest 'sh -lc '"'"'link=/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/active/demo-skill
repo_dir=/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/repo/demo-skill
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'host=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(hostname)"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'link_exists=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(if [ -L "$link" ]; then echo yes; else echo no; fi)"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'repo_exists=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(if [ -d "$repo_dir" ]; then echo yes; else echo no; fi)"
ls -la "$(dirname "$link")"
printf -- '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'--- repo listing ---
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
ls -la "$repo_dir"
test ! -e "$link"
'"'"''

ssh shuvbot 'sh -lc '"'"'link=/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/active/demo-skill
repo_dir=/tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-cli-skillops/repo/demo-skill
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'host=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(hostname)"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'link_exists=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(if [ -L "$link" ]; then echo yes; else echo no; fi)"
printf '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'repo_exists=%s
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' "$(if [ -d "$repo_dir" ]; then echo yes; else echo no; fi)"
ls -la "$(dirname "$link")"
printf -- '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'--- repo listing ---
'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'
ls -la "$repo_dir"
test ! -e "$link"
'"'"''

steps.expected: Return exit code 0 and report not-active behavior on both hosts.
steps.observed: exit 0; stdout reported not active for shuvtest and shuvbot.

steps.expected: The symlink remains absent and the repo files remain intact on both hosts.
steps.observed: Both hosts still reported link_exists=no and repo_exists=yes.
